tasks.subject: Comprehensive Go Porting and Workspace Stabilization
tasks.description: Perform a deep audit of the current Go vs Node.js feature parity, resolve the qbittorrent submodule issue, and prioritize remaining service porting (game-server, supertorrent, tracker) for a robust Go-first architecture. This includes verifying the current Go build, stabilizing the workspace, and documenting a detailed execution plan based on TODO, ROADMAP, and VISION.
tasks.activeForm: Establishing Project Context and Porting Strategy
